analysis_level.description:
Whether the IDs are 'trace' IDs or 'generation' IDs.

* `trace` - trace
* `generation` - generation

date_from.description: Start of date range for the lookup (e.g. '-7d' or '2026-01-01'). Defaults to -30d.

date_to.description: End of date range for the lookup. Defaults to now.

force_refresh.description: If true, bypass cache and reclassify.

ids.description: Trace IDs or generation IDs to classify, depending on analysis_level.
